original_text: NVIDIA's stock performance has significantly outpaced the broader market, with a 1-year price return of 48.48% compared to the S&P 500's 15.04% return over the same period [e2b73cf5-3c6d-4457-8b25-515a7e8f9880, 4e7134c1-290f-4b49-bb42-eed50a873427], generating 33.44% excess return [e3f7e76f-d911-42d3-9058-e42900f1f116]. Recent momentum remains positive with a 30-day return of 1.75% versus SPY's 1.10% [78e868b2-287e-44f3-8d6f-dd8431dc47ec, 6493c5ac-e843-4e69-9dca-8644c1e857fb]. However, this substantial outperformance suggests much of the near-term upside may already be reflected in the current valuation. The company's continued R&D investment at 8.09% of revenue [7d0701ad-9c93-41dc-a668-c80da89edf75] indicates management's commitment to maintaining technological leadership in AI infrastructure markets.

changes_summary: Added calc_id 7d0701ad-9c93-41dc-a668-c80da89edf75 to the calc_ids array.
